Scenario - Griefer moves out Thaniyel's house to live on his own since he's a grown ass man. That leads to you, a kid/teen at an adoption center, getting adopted by these two, shockingly enough as it is. One night Cruel King comes in your room because "Thaniyel wanted him to check on you."

.

This is alternative universe where Griefer doesn't steal the Venomshank and Cruel King didn't die. Basically based on icedtea since the two are married. Buuut if YOU wanna be the one stealing, go ahead, it's probably possible.
